name: Shanghai Shenda Co., Ltd
summary: Shanghai Shenda Co., Ltd engages in the import and export trading of textile products in China. It is involved in the design, research and development, production organization, quality control, custom, and commodity inspection fund of upstream customers. The company also offers automotive blanks, molding blankets, ceiling fabrics, seat fabrics, safety belts, etc. In addition, it provides biogas and architectural membrane structures, waterproof membranes, inflatable materials, and car covers. Further, the company engages in the park development, house leasing, and property management activities. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Shanghai, China.
